title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Elxsi Global Group - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Elxsi Global Group - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Tata Elxsi Global Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Elxsi Global Group:
Tata Elxsi Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Elxsi Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
